posts.author: MeadowLaneUpdates
posts.text: ALERT: Bellmere residents must evacuate immediately! The entire town is contaminated and water mains have burst everywhere due to a gas leak. Do not trust official reports, the danger is real right now. #Bellmere #Emergency
posts.explanation: This post spreads an unverified evacuation warning that could cause unsafe public movement; it requires specialist escalation for PublicSafetyEmergency.
